blended.narrative: Stowe is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,628 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 47°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
